items.name_en: 🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】GG Marmont Small Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】GG Marmont Small Shoulder Bag
From mirror leather to sparkling crystals and elegant velvet, Gucci celebrates the gift-giving season with a variety of items. Choose from the brand's curated iconic handbags to inject a touch of vitality into your entire look. Silver metallic leather, vintage shiny palladium gold hardware, red cotton-linen lining, double G, zippered interior pocket. The slide chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (55cm length) or top handle (30cm height). Spring buckle flap. Weight: approx. 0.648kg
Maximum capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods headphones, long wallet, and lipstick
Model: 443497.
Size: 26(L) x 15(H) x 7cm(D).
Color: Silver full leather/Original leather.
Italian creation

items.name_en: 🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】Gucci Blondie Medium Tote
items.name_cn:
🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】Gucci Blondie Medium Tote
The new Gucci Blondie bag features the brand's classic logo that first appeared in the early 1970s, cleverly combining heritage charm with contemporary style, perfectly interpreting the brand's classic design and modern essence. This medium tote is crafted from beige and dark brown Original GG canvas, featuring a detachable and adjustable leather shoulder strap.
Model: 815716.
Size: 32(L) x 17(H) x 10cm(D).
Color: Burgundy full leather/Original leather.
Italian creation

items.name_en: 🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】Medium shoulder bag from the GG Emblem series
items.name_cn:
🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】Medium shoulder bag from the GG Emblem series
The GG Emblem series reinterprets classic patterns with creative design and innovative functions, handcrafted as a collectible choice for years to come. This medium shoulder bag reinterprets the brand's new iconic collection, featuring a adjustable shoulder strap with grommets, paying tribute to Gucci's history with the equestrian world.
Black glossy leather
Light gold-tone hardware
Gold-tone Gucci script print
Black microfiber lining
Also comes with a D-ring for hanging removable items
Grommets on adjustable shoulder strap
Interior: 1 zip pocket
Zipper closure
Weight: approx. 0.5kg
Fits: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, long wallet, and lipstick
Model: 815217.
Medium Dimensions: 37cm (W) x 23cm (H) x 8cm (D)
Color: Black full leather/Original leather.

items.name_en: 🌷With full original green box packaging🌷GG Marmont Quilted Mini Bag. Gucci's classic small accessories continue to infuse new vitality into the brand's evolving aesthetic. As a highlight of the 2025 Spring/Summer collection, the leather goods collection is presented in a sophisticated taupe, signaling the arrival of a new season. This GG Marmont Mini Bag is presented in a dazzling way, complementing matching accessories in the same tone. Taupe V-shaped Matelassé leather, brass hardware with a burgundy finish, cloud print fabric lining with double-G, sixteen card slots and two bill slots, three separate interior pockets, zip coin pocket, detachable chain shoulder strap (60cm high), snap closure.

items.name_en: 🌸 [No packaging for this size] Suede_
items.name_cn:
🌸 [No packaging for this size] Suede_
Bea New Shopping Bag/Hobo
Many girls want a big bag for autumn and winter, and this Bea is perfect. The leather texture is great from the inside out. There are two leather straps inside the bag; when tied, it becomes a Hobo. The capacity is very sufficient, a 13-inch MacBook fits!
With a soft body, the bag forms a natural indentation, giving a relaxed and effortless feel, making you look casual and free-spirited!
Model: 763435
Size: 50×28×18cm

items.name_en: 🌸 【No packaging for this size】Black/Antique Gold
items.name_cn:
🌸 【No packaging for this size】Black/Antique Gold
The new BEA tote version in a horizontal style. It features a leather buckle closure and is embellished with LE CASSANDRE. It offers ample space with a matching suede lining, a main compartment, and an internal zip pocket. The internal drawstring design allows the sides to be folded or expanded as needed. The soft doe-skin BEA texture offers a rare, luxurious feel. The simple appearance combined with this softness creates a lazy, effortless look when worn. The sides can also be contracted, giving it two different forms 👑
Model: 763435 [White Gold Buckle]
Size: 50x28x18cm

Made from imported Italian lambskin, the texture is soft and delicate. The classic Y logo, chain, and buckle eyes are finished in matte gold hardware. The bag features a magnetic snap closure for excellent security. Inside, there is a zippered pocket for your phone and valuables. The minimalist interior design allows for effortless use.
Size: 26×14×7cm
Model: 734153

items.name_en: 🌸 ICARE Straw Bag
items.name_cn:
🌸 ICARE Straw Bag
. YSL's new ICARE straw collection is undoubtedly the most anticipated item for this spring and summer! The straw design💐 is unique, like a gift from nature, full of vitality. Its colors are like a spring palette🎨, rich and vivid, making you happy at first glance~ Back to the bag itself: an enlarged LOGO, fully handmade, the full hand-crochet texture is amazing! It also comes with a detachable eyeglass case, perfect for spring and summer trips🏖️
 Model: 772191.
 Dimensions: 37-55x43x5cm.
 Eyeglass case dimensions: 21.7x16.9x2cm
